name: Brownie Peanut Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, combine the brownie mix, hot water, oil, and egg. Stir until well mixed.
4. Fill each lined cup about two-thirds full with the batter.
5. Press a peanut butter cup into each cup until the top edge of the candy is even with the batter.
6. Bake for 20-30 minutes, or until set but slightly gooey in the center. Do not overbake.
7. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely before serving. Each cupcake contains approximately 230 calories.
